one_time_description: Wood Mountain Legacy Trust settlement funds recognized as revenue ($3,206,903) related to specific claims settlement ratified January 12, 2020
economic_notes: First Nation has 8.3% interest in FHQTC Developments LP (Keseechiwan Holdings LP) with equity value of $444,215. COVID-19 impacted operations including reduced First Nations Trust casino revenues. Subsequent event: received $475,079 from court judgment against Goodtracks on August 26, 2021.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024. Financial statements were signed May 4-6, 2022 (over a year late). Large one-time item: Wood Mountain Legacy Trust specific claims settlement ($3,206,903 revenue). Restricted cash includes $1,900,000 GIC at Royal Bank. Prior year restated for two adjustments: capitalization of Water Treatment Plant (+$55,644 TCA) and QBOW Child & Family Services deferred revenue adjustment (+$91,000 surplus). No long-term debt; line of credit of $2,595,392 was paid off in June 2020. No consolidated subsidiaries or GBEs. Portfolio investment in Keseechiwan Holdings LP at cost $60,000 (equity value $444,215). Contingent liability from Goodtrack estate claim up to $2,250,000. Deferred revenue - current year line is negative as it represents deferral of current year funding.
